commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=65f7d11bc5e8cc52db409ae1f11bd07f8ad703aa)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes cron input normalization so literal string `"null"` becomes `null` for `agentId` and `sessionKey`, with normalization tests for create and patch inputs.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main exposes string-only cron tool fields, preserves `"null"` as a non-empty string in normalization, and stores non-empty string session keys in the cron service. I did not run a live gateway round-trip in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This needs author or maintainer handling for the agentId compatibility decision plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof; it is not a ClawSweeper repair candidate while the external proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix(cron): treat string "null" as a clear signal for agentId and sessionKey
target.body:
## Summary

`normalizeCronJobInput` now maps the string `"null"` to `null` for `agentId` and `sessionKey`, matching the existing `null`-value handling already present in the same function.

The cron tool schema keeps its fields as plain `string` type for OpenAPI 3.0 compat (enforced by an existing test that documents the rationale). The field descriptions say "or null to clear it", so agents that follow the description may encode the intent as the string `"null"` — the only string a well-behaving agent would supply that is not a valid session key or agent id. Without this change, `"null"` passes through normalization as a literal value and reaches the gateway as a real key name.

The gateway protocol schema (`protocol/schema/cron.ts:112-113`) already uses `Type.Optional(Type.Union([NonEmptyString, Type.Null()]))` for these fields — this PR makes the tool-side normalization consistent with that contract.

## Verification

**Behavior addressed:** `cron(action="update", patch={ sessionKey: null })` stores `"null"` (string) instead of clearing the field.

**Real environment tested:** normalization unit tests.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/normalize.test.ts
```

**Evidence after fix:** 57 tests pass (2 new assertions cover the `"null"` string case for both `sessionKey` patch and `agentId` create).

**Observed result after fix:** `normalizeCronJobPatch({ sessionKey: "null" })` returns `{ sessionKey: null }`.

**What was not tested:** live gateway round-trip (requires running gateway).

Closes #83601
target.author: martingarramon
